# Backup and Recovery Guide

Protect your data with automated backups and recovery.

## Creating Backups

```bash
nself backup create
```

## Listing Backups

```bash
nself backup list
```

## Restoring from Backup

```bash
nself backup restore backup-id
```

## Automated Backups

```bash
nself backup schedule --daily --keep 30
```

See [Backup Commands](../commands/BACKUP.md) for complete reference.
